summary: Affiliate Application Flow - All features verified working. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements and flows verified.
seed_data_creation: Test applications created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Affiliate Application Flow fully verified: 1) Public page at /partners/apply renders with all form fields (Full Name, Email, Phone, Business Name, Region, Notes, Submit button). 2) POST /api/affiliate-applications creates application with status 'pending' - no auth required. 3) Duplicate email correctly rejected with 400 error. 4) GET /api/affiliate-applications returns list of applications. 5) Admin page at /admin/affiliate-applications shows table with Applicant, Phone, Business, Region, Applied, Status columns. 6) 'Applications' sidebar entry visible under 'Growth & Affiliates'. 7) Clicking row opens StandardDrawerShell with applicant details, notes, approve/reject buttons in footer. 8) POST /api/affiliate-applications/{id}/approve creates affiliate with auto-commission from settings (12%). 9) POST /api/affiliate-applications/{id}/reject updates status to rejected. 10) After approval, application status shows as 'approved' with green badge.

details: Form fields: Full Name, Email, Phone, Business Name, Region, Notes
Success state shows after submission with data-testid='apply-success'
No auth required for public submission
Returns application object with id, created_at, status='pending'
Error message: 'An application with this email already exists'
Table columns: Applicant, Phone, Business, Region, Applied, Status
Filter buttons: All, Pending, Approved, Rejected
Shows: Full Name, Email, Phone, Business, Region, Applied date
Shows Commission info: 'Automatically assigned from system settings upon approval'
Approve and Reject buttons in footer for pending applications
Optional rejection note can be provided
